title: A billion dollars each? While you work 9-to-5, these 6 Meta execs are in line for a billion-dollar AI payday
description: Meta plans huge AI growth and may reward six top executives with massive bonuses. The payouts depend on strong company performance and future targets. This comes as layoffs happen and spending on artificial intelligence rises. The company is aiming for major expansion. At the same time, Meta also faces legal and workplace challenges while reshaping teams and focusing more on AI development.

title: From oil shock to algo shock: Iran war is shaking AI industry
description: The Iran conflict is now impacting artificial intelligence development. Rising energy costs and supply chain issues are making AI more expensive. Companies are delaying investments due to uncertainty. This could lead to AI growth slowing down and fragmenting globally. Different regions may develop AI at different paces. This shift highlights AI's dependence on physical resources and stability.
